description: Bring the live Textual Bluetooth tab in tui.py into close visual and interaction parity with docs/design/rpi-screenshots/RPi-BT-TUI.png, and keep the WebUI Bluetooth settings design aligned with docs/design/bluetooth/bt-webui-gemini-prototype.html while preserving the shared Bluetooth backend and live dashboard constraints.
dependencies: Bluetooth control center v2 state contract
